section.title: Step 2: Enable four extras
section.p: Action: Add noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes, noImplicitReturns, noFallthroughCasesInSwitch.

section.title: Step 3: Eliminate any
section.p: Action: Replace any with unknown + guards or concrete types.

section.title: Step 4: Add Zod at IO
section.p: Action: Author Zod schemas; parse at entry.

section.title: Step 5: Enforce in CI
section.p: Action: Add tsc --noEmit and Zod test to CI.
